description: Keithley Model 2015/2015-P (and 2016) THD Multimeter: a 6.5-digit audio-analysis DMM that measures DC/AC voltage and current, 2- and 4-wire resistance, frequency, period, temperature, continuity and diodes, plus audio distortion functions (THD, THD+N, SINAD). The 2015-P adds an FFT analyzer with peak/marker and frequency-list functions and a built-in sine-wave source. Programmed using SCPI over GPIB (IEEE-488) or RS-232.

identity.description: IEEE-488.2 identification query. Returns the instrument identification string including the model number, used to identify the Model 2015/2016 over the bus.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Return the instrument to its *RST default conditions. Sets INIT:CONT OFF, TRIG:SOUR IMM, TRIG:COUNT 1 and continuous initiation disabled.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clear Status. Clears the Standard Event, Operation Event, Measurement Event and Questionable Event registers and the Error Queue.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Identification query. Returns the manufacturer, model number, serial number and firmware revision.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Program the Standard Event Status Enable Register. *ESE 0 clears the register.

commands.name: event_status_read
commands.description: Read and clear the Standard Event Status Register.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Operation Complete. Sets the OPC bit in the Standard Event Status Register when all pending operations are finished.

commands.name: wait_to_continue
commands.description: Wait-to-Continue. Hold off the processing of subsequent commands until all previous operations are completed.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Bus trigger. Equivalent to a GPIB GET; triggers a measurement when the trigger source is set to BUS.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Program the Service Request Enable Register. *SRE 0 disables service requests.

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Read the Status Byte Register (the MSS bit appears in the *STB? response).

commands.name: save_setup
commands.description: Save the present instrument setup in the specified memory location.

commands.name: recall_setup
commands.description: Recall a previously saved instrument setup from the specified memory location.

commands.name: configure_function
commands.description: Place the instrument in a one-shot measurement mode for the specified function. Selected-function controls default to *RST values, continuous initiation is disabled, trigger source is set to Immediate, count to one and delay to zero. Use READ? to trigger and acquire a reading.

parameters.name: function
parameters.range: CURRent:AC, CURRent[:DC], VOLTage:AC, VOLTage[:DC], RESistance, FRESistance, PERiod, FREQuency, TEMPerature, DIODe, CONTinuity, DISTortion

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Request the latest post-processed reading. Does not trigger a measurement and can repeatedly return the same reading. Returns error -230 (Data corrupt or stale) if no reading is available. Not permitted while in LIST/sweep output mode (returns +811).

commands.name: read
commands.description: Perform an :ABORt, :INITiate and :FETCh? to trigger and acquire a reading (or a SAMPle:COUNt number of readings, stored in the buffer). Does not work when trigger source is BUS or EXTernal (error -214). Not permitted in LIST/sweep output mode.

commands.name: measure_function
commands.description: One-shot measurement. Combines :ABORt, :CONFigure:<function> and :READ? to reconfigure for the specified function (using *RST defaults), trigger a single reading and return the result.

parameters.name: function
parameters.range: CURRent:AC, CURRent[:DC], VOLTage:AC, VOLTage[:DC], RESistance, FRESistance, PERiod, FREQuency, TEMPerature, DIODe, CONTinuity, DISTortion

commands.name: sense_function
commands.description: Select the measurement function. The function name must be enclosed in quotes.

commands.name: sense_data
commands.description: Return the last instrument reading.

commands.name: sense_data_fresh
commands.description: Return the latest reading after a trigger (similar to FETCh?), but guarantees it will not return the same reading twice. Waits for a reading in progress to complete. Does not trigger a reading.

commands.name: sense_data_latest
commands.description: Return the last reading the instrument had, regardless of whether it was invalidated by changing ranges or functions. Can return old/meaningless data.

commands.name: hold_window
commands.description: Set the Hold window as a percentage.

commands.name: hold_count
commands.description: Set the Hold count (number of readings within the window).

commands.name: hold_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the Hold feature.

commands.name: voltage_dc_range
commands.description: Select the DC voltage measurement range (upper).

commands.name: voltage_dc_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable DC voltage autoranging.

commands.name: voltage_dc_nplc
commands.description: Set the DC voltage integration rate in power-line cycles.

commands.name: voltage_dc_digits
commands.description: Set the DC voltage measurement resolution in digits.

commands.name: voltage_dc_average_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the DC voltage digital averaging filter.

commands.name: voltage_dc_average_count
commands.description: Set the DC voltage averaging filter count.

commands.name: voltage_dc_average_tcontrol
commands.description: Select the DC voltage averaging filter type (moving or repeating). REPeat is the *RST default; MOVing is the :SYSTem:PRESet default.

commands.name: voltage_dc_reference
commands.description: Specify the DC voltage relative reference value.

commands.name: voltage_dc_reference_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the DC voltage relative reference.

commands.name: voltage_dc_reference_acquire
commands.description: Use the present input signal as the DC voltage reference value.

commands.name: voltage_ac_range
commands.description: Select the AC voltage measurement range (upper).

commands.name: voltage_ac_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable AC voltage autoranging.

commands.name: voltage_ac_nplc
commands.description: Set the AC voltage integration rate in power-line cycles.

commands.name: voltage_ac_detector_bandwidth
commands.description: Specify the AC voltage detector bandwidth.

commands.name: current_dc_range
commands.description: Select the DC current measurement range (upper).

commands.name: current_dc_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable DC current autoranging.

commands.name: current_dc_nplc
commands.description: Set the DC current integration rate in power-line cycles.

commands.name: current_ac_range
commands.description: Select the AC current measurement range (upper).

commands.name: current_ac_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable AC current autoranging.

commands.name: resistance_range
commands.description: Select the 2-wire resistance measurement range (upper).

commands.name: resistance_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable 2-wire resistance autoranging.

commands.name: resistance_nplc
commands.description: Set the 2-wire resistance integration rate in power-line cycles.

commands.name: fresistance_range
commands.description: Select the 4-wire resistance measurement range (upper).

commands.name: fresistance_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable 4-wire resistance autoranging.

commands.name: temperature_nplc
commands.description: Set the temperature integration rate in power-line cycles.

commands.name: temperature_tcouple_type
commands.description: Select the thermocouple type for temperature measurements.

commands.name: temperature_rjunction_simulated
commands.description: Specify the simulated reference-junction temperature in degrees C.

commands.name: frequency_aperture
commands.description: Set the gate/aperture time for frequency measurements.

commands.name: frequency_threshold_voltage_range
commands.description: Select the threshold voltage range for frequency measurements.

commands.name: period_aperture
commands.description: Set the gate/aperture time for period measurements.

commands.name: period_threshold_voltage_range
commands.description: Select the threshold voltage range for period measurements.

commands.name: diode_current_range
commands.description: Select the test-current range for diode testing.

commands.name: continuity_threshold
commands.description: Set the threshold resistance for the continuity test.

commands.name: distortion_type
commands.description: Select the distortion measurement type: total harmonic distortion (THD), THD plus noise (THDN) or signal-to-noise-and-distortion (SINAD).

commands.name: distortion_range
commands.description: Select the distortion measurement input range (upper).

commands.name: distortion_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable distortion autoranging.

commands.name: distortion_digits
commands.description: Set the distortion measurement resolution in digits.

commands.name: distortion_average_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the distortion averaging filter.

commands.name: distortion_average_count
commands.description: Set the distortion averaging filter count.

commands.name: distortion_average_tcontrol
commands.description: Select the distortion averaging filter type (moving or repeating).

commands.name: distortion_frequency
commands.description: Set the fundamental frequency used for the distortion analysis.

commands.name: distortion_frequency_auto
commands.description: Set auto frequency acquisition: ON acquires the fundamental frequency before each reading; OFF uses the last acquired or output frequency.

commands.name: distortion_frequency_acquire
commands.description: Measure the fundamental frequency once and use it for distortion analysis.

commands.name: distortion_harmonic
commands.description: Set the number of the highest harmonic included in the distortion calculation.

commands.name: distortion_harmonic_magnitude
commands.description: Query the magnitudes of the measured harmonics over the specified start/end range.

commands.name: distortion_sfilter
commands.description: Select the shaping (weighting) filter applied to the distortion measurement.

commands.name: distortion_thd
commands.description: Query the calculated THD reading for the last triggered measurement (number of harmonics depends on HARMonic setting).

commands.name: distortion_thdn
commands.description: Query the calculated THD+noise reading for the last triggered measurement.

commands.name: distortion_rms
commands.description: Query the calculated AC volts RMS value of the input waveform for the last measurement.

commands.name: distortion_hco
commands.description: Set the high cutoff frequency of the bandpass filter (must be above LCO).

commands.name: distortion_hco_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the high cutoff filter.

commands.name: distortion_lco
commands.description: Set the low cutoff frequency of the bandpass filter (must be below HCO).

commands.name: distortion_lco_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the low cutoff filter.

commands.name: distortion_fft_bins
commands.description: Query the magnitude of the FFT bins over the specified start/end range (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_max
commands.description: Request the maximum amplitude (in dBV) and its frequency, updating the current location marker to that frequency (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_next
commands.description: Request the next lower maximum amplitude (dBV) and frequency, updating the current location marker (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_left
commands.description: Request the next lower amplitude (dBV) at a frequency lower than the present, updating the current location marker (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_right
commands.description: Request the next lower amplitude (dBV) at a frequency higher than the present, updating the current location marker (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_sref
commands.description: Set the reference marker to the current frequency location (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_srf
commands.description: Move the present location marker to the bin associated with the specified frequency (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_delta
commands.description: Request the frequency (Hz) and amplitude (dBV) difference between the reference marker and the present location (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_loc
commands.description: Request the frequency and amplitude (dBV) of the present location marker (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_lower
commands.description: Set the lower bound for the peak frequency search (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_upper
commands.description: Set the upper bound for the peak frequency search (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_list
commands.description: Specify a list of frequencies (up to 50) to be analyzed (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: distortion_peak_list_data
commands.description: Request the amplitudes for the frequencies in the peak list (Model 2015-P).

commands.name: calc1_format
commands.description: Select the CALC1 math format: NONE (no calculation), MXB (mx+b polynomial) or PERCent.

commands.name: calc1_kmath_mmfactor
commands.description: Set the 'm' factor for the mx+b calculation.

commands.name: calc1_kmath_mbfactor
commands.description: Set the 'b' factor for the mx+b calculation.

commands.name: calc1_kmath_munits
commands.description: Specify the units (three characters A-Z) for the mx+b reading.

commands.name: calc1_kmath_percent
commands.description: Set the target value for the PERCent calculation.

commands.name: calc1_kmath_percent_acquire
commands.description: Acquire the present input signal reading and use it as the PERCent target value.

commands.name: calc1_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the CALC1 (kmath) calculation.

commands.name: calc1_data
commands.description: Read the result of the CALC1 calculation. If CALC1 is disabled or NONE, the raw reading is returned.

commands.name: calc2_format
commands.description: Select the CALC2 statistics format applied to buffer readings.

commands.name: calc2_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the CALC2 calculation.

commands.name: calc2_immediate
commands.description: Recalculate the raw input data in the buffer using the selected CALC2 format. The query form performs the calculation and returns the result.

commands.name: calc2_data
commands.description: Read the CALC2 result. If CALC2 is disabled or NONE, the raw reading is returned.

commands.name: calc3_limit_upper
commands.description: Set the upper limit value for the LIMIT1 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit_lower
commands.description: Set the lower limit value for the LIMIT1 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the LIMIT1 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit_fail
commands.description: Read the LIMIT1 test result (0 = pass, 1 = fail). Reading does not clear the fail indication.

commands.name: calc3_limit_clear
commands.description: Clear the LIMIT1 failed-test indication.

commands.name: calc3_limit_clear_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable auto-clear of the LIMIT1 fail indication when entering the idle state.

commands.name: calc3_limit2_upper
commands.description: Set the upper limit value for the LIMIT2 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit2_lower
commands.description: Set the lower limit value for the LIMIT2 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit2_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the LIMIT2 limit test.

commands.name: calc3_limit2_fail
commands.description: Read the LIMIT2 test result.

commands.name: calc3_immediate
commands.description: Re-process the current input data to re-perform the limit tests with new test limits. Does not initiate a reading conversion.

commands.name: display_text_data
commands.description: Define an ASCII text message (up to 12 characters) for the front-panel display. Characters must be quoted.

parameters.name: message
parameters.range: up to 12 ASCII characters in quotes

commands.name: display_text_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the user text message display mode.

commands.name: display_enable
commands.description: Enable or disable the front-panel display circuitry. Disabling increases measurement speed.

commands.name: format_data
commands.description: Select the data format for transferred readings.

commands.name: format_elements
commands.description: Specify the data elements returned with each reading.

commands.name: format_border
commands.description: Select the binary byte order for SREal/DREal transfers.

commands.name: unit_temperature
commands.description: Select the temperature measurement units.

commands.name: unit_voltage_ac
commands.description: Select the AC voltage measurement units.

commands.name: unit_voltage_ac_db_reference
commands.description: Specify the dB reference voltage for ACV dB units.

commands.name: unit_voltage_ac_dbm_impedance
commands.description: Specify the dBm reference impedance for ACV dBm units.

commands.name: unit_voltage_dc
commands.description: Select the DC voltage measurement units.

commands.name: unit_distortion
commands.description: Set the distortion measurement units.

commands.name: output_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the sine-wave source output.

commands.name: output_frequency
commands.description: Set the sine-wave source output frequency.

commands.name: output_amplitude
commands.description: Set the sine-wave source output amplitude.

parameters.name: amplitude
parameters.range: 0 to 4 for HIZ, 0 to 2 for others (default 0.5)

commands.name: output_impedance
commands.description: Set the sine-wave source output impedance.

commands.name: output_mode
commands.description: Set the source output mode (fixed output or list/sweep).

commands.name: output_list
commands.description: Set the source sweep list points as amplitude/frequency pairs (maximum 50, append up to 200).

commands.name: output_list_append
commands.description: Append points (50 at a time) to the end of the sweep list.

commands.name: output_list_delay
commands.description: Set the source settling time for each sweep point.

commands.name: output_list_elements
commands.description: Set the reading elements returned by the sweep :DATA? query.

commands.name: output_list_data
commands.description: Query the results of the sweep (in the format set by ELEMents).

commands.name: output_list_points
commands.description: Query the number of points in the sweep list.

commands.name: route_scan_external
commands.description: Specify the external scan list (scanner card channels).

commands.name: route_scan_lselect
commands.description: Select the scan operation (external scan or none).

commands.name: initiate
commands.description: Initiate one trigger cycle, taking the instrument out of the idle state.

commands.name: initiate_continuous
commands.description: Enable or disable continuous initiation. *RST disables; :SYSTem:PRESet enables.

commands.name: abort
commands.description: Reset the trigger system, returning the instrument to the idle state (if continuous initiation is off).

commands.name: trigger_count
commands.description: Set the number of measurements per trigger cycle. *RST default is 1; :SYSTem:PRESet sets INF.

commands.name: trigger_delay
commands.description: Set the trigger delay.

commands.name: trigger_delay_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic trigger delay.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Select the trigger control source.

commands.name: trigger_timer
commands.description: Set the timer interval between measurements when the trigger source is TIMer.

commands.name: trigger_signal
commands.description: Bypass (loop around) the trigger control source for one trigger cycle.

commands.name: sample_count
commands.description: Specify the sample count (number of readings per INITiate/READ?).

commands.name: trace_clear
commands.description: Clear all readings from the buffer.

commands.name: trace_free
commands.description: Query the bytes available and bytes in use in the buffer.

commands.name: trace_points
commands.description: Specify the size of the reading buffer.

commands.name: trace_feed
commands.description: Select the source of readings stored in the buffer.

commands.name: trace_feed_control
commands.description: Select the buffer control mode.

commands.name: trace_data
commands.description: Read all readings in the buffer.

commands.name: status_measurement_event
commands.description: Read the Measurement Event Register.

commands.name: status_measurement_enable
commands.description: Program the Measurement Event Enable Register.

commands.name: status_measurement_condition
commands.description: Read the Measurement Condition Register.

commands.name: status_operation_event
commands.description: Read the Operation Event Register.

commands.name: status_operation_enable
commands.description: Program the Operation Event Enable Register.

commands.name: status_questionable_event
commands.description: Read the Questionable Event Register.

commands.name: status_questionable_enable
commands.description: Program the Questionable Event Enable Register.

commands.name: status_preset
commands.description: Return the status registers to their default (preset) states.

commands.name: status_queue_next
commands.description: Read the most recent error/status message from the Error Queue.

commands.name: status_queue_clear
commands.description: Clear all messages from the Error Queue.

commands.name: system_preset
commands.description: Return the instrument to its :SYSTem:PRESet default conditions.

commands.name: system_posetup
commands.description: Select the power-on setup configuration.

commands.name: system_frswitch
commands.description: Query the INPUTS front/rear switch position (0 = rear, 1 = front).

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Query the revision level of the SCPI standard implemented.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Query (read) the next message from the Error Queue.

commands.name: system_clear
commands.description: Clear messages from the Error Queue.

commands.name: system_azero_state
commands.description: Enable or disable autozero.

commands.name: system_key
commands.description: Simulate a front-panel key press.

commands.name: system_beeper_state
commands.description: Enable or disable the beeper.

commands.name: system_kclick
commands.description: Turn the front-panel key click on or off.

commands.name: system_lfrequency
commands.description: Query the detected power-line frequency.

commands.name: system_local
commands.description: Take the instrument out of remote and restore front-panel control (RS-232 only).

commands.name: system_remote
commands.description: Place the instrument in remote (RS-232 only).

commands.name: system_rwlock
commands.description: Lock out the front-panel controls (RS-232 only).
